name: @myndhyve/wop-conformance
description: Black-box conformance test suite for WOP-compliant servers. FINAL v1.0 (suite at 1.9.0). 1.9.0 adds approval-payload vocabulary scenarios (§7 drift audit closure for Q7) + adopts spec corrections in c0d63ae (action enum `'edit'`→`'edit-accept'`, refineFeedback object shape, decidedBy layer distinction, manifest_path_mismatch granular pair, version_conflict alias, run scope reserved). 1.8.0 vendored api/openapi.yaml + api/asyncapi.yaml + schemas/*.schema.json into the published tarball (closes WOP-INTREE-DELETION-AUDIT.md M2). 1.7.0 added vendor-neutral redaction scenarios (NFR-7).
